inputs.label: Initial Velocity
inputs.businessContext: The initial speed of the projectile at launch

businessContext_i18n.en: The initial speed of the projectile at launch
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anfangsgeschwindigkeit des Projektils beim Abschuss
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse initiale du projectile au lancement

inputs.label: Launch Angle
inputs.businessContext: The angle of launch relative to horizontal

businessContext_i18n.en: The angle of launch relative to horizontal
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle de lancement par rapport à l'horizontale

inputs.label: Projectile Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the projectile, used for kinetic energy calculation

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the projectile, used for kinetic energy calculation
businessContext_i18n.tr: Merminin kütlesi, kinetik enerji hesaplaması için kullanılır
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des Projektils, wird für die kinetische Energieberechnung verwendet
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse du projectile, utilisée pour le calcul de l'énergie cinétique

inputs.label: Launch Height
inputs.businessContext: Height above ground from which projectile is launched. 0 for ground level.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height above ground from which projectile is launched. 0 for ground level.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Merminin fırlatıldığı yerden yüksekliği. Zemin seviyesi için 0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe über dem Boden, von der das Projektil abgeworfen wird. 0 für Bodenhöhe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur au-dessus du sol à partir de laquelle le projectile est lancé. 0 pour le niveau du sol.
